To: Sandra Taylor <sandra.taylor@northwindtra.com>
Date: 2024-02-06 13:30 EST
Subject: Follow-up: pipeline hygiene Review

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with pipeline hygiene. What are the next steps from your side?

From: Sandra Taylor <sandra.taylor@northwindtra.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-03 14:02 EST
Subject: URGENT: pipeline hygiene Issue at Northwind Traders

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about pipeline hygiene. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

Meeting: pipeline hygiene Discussion - Northwind Traders
Date: 2024-02-23
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Sandra Taylor (Northwind Traders), Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft), David (Northwind Traders)

[00:02:00] Sandra Taylor (Northwind Traders): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on pipeline hygiene from our last session.

[00:08:00] Sandra Taylor (Northwind Traders): The timeline for integration complexity is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:13:00] Sandra Taylor (Northwind Traders): On the pipeline hygiene front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around budget approval.

[00:15:00] David (Northwind Traders): The timeline for data residency is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:17:00] David (Northwind Traders): Our director reviewed this and has concerns about vendor dependencies. Can we address those?

[00:22:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): Our team lead reviewed this and has concerns about data residency. Can we address those?

[00:27:00] Sandra Taylor (Northwind Traders): On the pipeline hygiene front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around technical validation.

[00:29:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is partner engagement.

[00:31:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on timeline constraints and found that there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us.
